changes.transaction: Arizona Diamondbacks placed SS Jordan Lawlar on the 10-day injured list. Right wrist fracture.
Pittsburgh Pirates placed SS Jared Triolo on the 10-day injured list retroactive to April 4, 2026. Right knee patellar tendon injury.
Beloit Sky Carp placed SS Aiva Arquette on the 7-day injured list.
Chicago Cubs placed RHP Cade Horton on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 4, 2026. Right forearm strain.
New York Yankees placed SS Anthony Volpe on the 10-day injured list retroactive to March 22, 2026. Left shoulder surgery recovery.
Lehigh Valley IronPigs placed RF Gabriel Rincones Jr. on the 7-day injured list.
New York Yankees placed LHP Carlos Rodón on the 15-day injured list retroactive to March 22, 2026. Left elbow surgery recovery.
Colorado Rockies activated RF Mickey Moniak from the 10-day injured list.
Arizona Diamondbacks recalled SS Jose Fernandez from Reno Aces.
Houston Astros placed RHP Hunter Brown on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 2, 2026. Right shoulder strain.
Seattle Mariners placed RHP Bryce Miller on the 15-day injured list retroactive to March 22, 2026. Left oblique strain.
Houston Astros placed LHP Josh Hader on the 15-day injured list. Left biceps tendinitis.
Kansas City Royals placed RHP Carlos Estévez on the 15-day injured list retroactive to March 29, 2026. Left foot contusion.
Toledo Mud Hens placed 2B Max Anderson on the 7-day injured list.
Seattle Mariners optioned SS Colt Emerson to Tacoma Rainiers.
Milwaukee Brewers placed CF Jackson Chourio on the 10-day injured list retroactive to March 25, 2026. Left hand fracture.
Los Angeles Dodgers placed LHP Blake Snell on the 15-day injured list retroactive to March 22, 2026. Left shoulder fatigue.
Miami Marlins placed LF Kyle Stowers on the 10-day injured list retroactive to March 22, 2026. Right hamstring strain.
Milwaukee Brewers optioned SS Cooper Pratt to Nashville Sounds.
Seattle Mariners activated SS J.P. Crawford from the 10-day injured list.
Erie SeaWolves placed C Josue Briceño on the 60-day injured list.
Los Angeles Dodgers placed SS Mookie Betts on the 10-day injured list. Right oblique strain.
Atlanta Braves placed RHP Spencer Strider on the 15-day injured list. Left oblique muscle strain.
Sugar Land Space Cowboys placed CF Zach Cole on the 7-day injured list.
Toronto Blue Jays recalled C Brandon Valenzuela from Buffalo Bisons.
Lehigh Valley IronPigs placed SS Aidan Miller on the 7-day injured list.
Toronto Blue Jays placed C Alejandro Kirk on the 10-day injured list. Left thumb fracture.
